title: sideroxylon calophylloides
intro: Sideroxylon calophylloides, also known as the Guanacaste tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae, native to Central America and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Sideroxylon calophylloides include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
